assertions.title: Video URL data present in API response for completed audits

steps.expected: 200 with video_urls dict containing scenario_persona keys
steps.observed: 200 OK. video_urls contains 4 keys: cookie_consent_privacy_sensitive, cookie_consent_cost_sensitive, checkout_flow_privacy_sensitive, checkout_flow_cost_sensitive — each mapping to /artifacts/videos/{id}/{key}.webm

steps.expected: 200 with video_urls null or empty (pre-video-feature audit)
steps.observed: 200 OK. video_urls is null — correct for pre-video-feature audit

evidence.network: GET /api/audits/e2ed0938-... -> 200 (video_urls dict with 4 entries); GET /api/audits/48fcd4cc-... -> 200 (video_urls: null); HEAD all 4 video URLs -> 200 video/webm content-length:37

assertions.title: Mock mode produces valid mock video data

steps.expected: video_urls with entries for all scenario-persona pairs
steps.observed: video_urls dict has 4 entries (2 scenarios x 2 personas), all pointing to /artifacts/videos/{id}/{key}.webm

steps.action: HEAD each of 4 mock video URLs
steps.observed: All 4 return HTTP 200, Content-Type: video/webm, Content-Length: 37 (placeholder .webm content)

steps.action: Verify events include video recording phase
steps.observed: 4 events with phase='video' and message='Recorded session video for {scenario} / {persona}', each with video_url in details

evidence.network: GET /api/audits/e2ed0938-... -> 200 (4 video_urls); HEAD 4 video URLs -> all 200 video/webm content-length:37

assertions.title: Database migrations succeed without data loss

steps.action: Run: cd backend && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m alembic upgrade head
steps.observed: Exit code 0. Output: 'Context impl SQLiteImpl. Will assume non-transactional DDL.' — already at head, no pending migrations

steps.expected: 200 with all data intact including video_urls
steps.observed: 200 OK. All fields present: id, target_url, mode=mock, status=completed, trust_score=100.0, video_urls with 4 entries, 12 events, metrics — all intact

steps.expected: 200 with all data intact, video_urls null
steps.observed: 200 OK. All fields present: id, target_url, mode=mock, status=completed, trust_score=100.0, video_urls=null, 12 events — all intact

evidence.network: alembic upgrade head -> exit 0; GET both audit endpoints -> 200 with data intact

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-VIDEO-001: Mock audit API response includes video_urls dict with 4 scenario_persona entries, all resolving to HTTP 200 video/webm; old audit correctly has video_urls=null. VAL-VIDEO-002: Mock mode produces valid placeholder .webm files served with correct content-type and non-zero content-length. VAL-CROSS-010: Alembic migration at head, both audits remain queryable with all data intact.
